free_text: SCHEDULE B - TRANSACTIONS. Name: Rohit Khanna. Page ____ of ____. Blank Schedule B grid template (columns: Type of Transaction [Purchase / Sale / Partial Sale / Exchange], Check Box if Capital Gain Exceeded $200, Date, Amount of Transaction A-K). The only text entered in the data area is the header note "Please see the attached" - the actual transactions are on the attached typed table pages that follow. The greyed pre-printed Example row (SP / Example / Mega Corp. Stock, Partial Sale, capital-gain box X, date ~3/6/16, Amount col B $15,001-$50,000) is ignored per spec. No real transaction rows on this page.
